title: NASA's Perseverance rover now has its own 'GPS' on Mars: 'We've given the rover a new ability'
description: NASA's Perseverance rover can now pinpoint its exact location on Mars without help from Earth, paving the way for longer, more autonomous exploration.
content: NASA's Perseverance rover can now pinpoint its exact location on Mars without help from Earth, paving the way for longer, more autonomous exploration.
